list.name: user
list.label: Person
list.definition: SELECT name FROM "user" WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL ORDER BY name
list.query: SELECT name FROM "user" WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL ORDER BY name

panels.title: Photos & videos
panels.description: Items captured in the selected time range (and person).

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime")
SELECT count(*) FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a.type='IMAGE'
SELECT count(*) FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a.type='VIDEO'

panels.title: Storage used
panels.description: Real on-disk usage Immich tracks (originals + thumbnails + encoded video). Current total — not affected by the time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum("quotaUsageInBytes") FROM "user" WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user'='All' OR name='$user')

panels.title: People found
panels.description: Distinct face clusters detected by AI. Current total.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM person p WHERE ('$user'='All' OR p."ownerId"=(SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name='$user'))

panels.title: Photos this year
panels.description: Taken this calendar year.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND extract(year from a."localDateTime")=extract(year from now())

panels.title: On this day (photos taken on today's date, by year)
panels.description: Memories: photos taken on today's calendar day in previous years.

targets.rawSql: SELECT extract(year from a."localDateTime")::int::text AS year, count(*) AS photos FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND to_char(a."localDateTime",'MM-DD')=to_char(now(),'MM-DD') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT extract(year from a."localDateTime")::int::text AS year, count(*) AS photos FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND extract(year from a."localDateTime") >= extract(year from now())-1 AND a."localDateTime" <= now() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Busiest days
panels.description: Days you captured the most.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('day',a."localDateTime"),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Day", count(*) AS "Photos" FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: When photos were taken (per month)
panels.description: By the date each photo was actually taken (EXIF).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month',a."localDateTime") AS time, count(*) AS "Photos" FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: When photos were added (per month)
panels.description: By the date each item was imported into Immich. Log scale so bulk imports don't flatten the rest.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('month',a."createdAt") AS time, count(*) AS "Added" FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."createdAt") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE a.type WHEN 'IMAGE' THEN 'Photos' WHEN 'VIDEO' THEN 'Videos' ELSE a.type END AS kind, count(*) AS n FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT extract(year from a."localDateTime")::int::text AS year, count(*) AS items FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE WHEN a.width*a.height>=20000000 THEN '20 MP+' WHEN a.width*a.height>=12000000 THEN '12-20 MP' WHEN a.width*a.height>=8000000 THEN '8-12 MP' WHEN a.width*a.height>0 THEN 'Under 8 MP' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS quality, count(*) AS n, min(a.width*a.height) AS ord FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ord

panels.title: Storage by type
panels.description: Videos are few but often dominate disk.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE a.type WHEN 'IMAGE' THEN 'Photos' WHEN 'VIDEO' THEN 'Videos' ELSE a.type END AS kind, sum(e."fileSizeInByte") AS bytes FROM asset a JOIN asset_exif e ON e."assetId"=a.id WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT date_trunc('year',a."localDateTime") AS time, CASE a.type WHEN 'IMAGE' THEN 'Photos' WHEN 'VIDEO' THEN 'Videos' ELSE a.type END AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Which phones & cameras
panels.description: Brand names normalised (OnePlus/ONEPLUS merged).

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(initcap(e.make),'(unknown)') AS brand, count(*) AS photos FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Camera models
panels.description: Brand shown alongside the model code.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(initcap(e.make),'?') AS "Brand", e.model AS "Model", count(*) AS "Photos" FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e.model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 12

panels.title: Lenses
panels.description: Lens metadata is present on ~17% of photos.

targets.rawSql: SELECT e."lensModel" AS "Lens", count(*) AS "Photos" FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e."lensModel" IS NOT NULL AND e."lensModel"<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT round(e."focalLength")::int AS mm, count(*) AS photos FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e."focalLength">0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT 'f/'||to_char(e."fNumber",'FM990.0') AS aperture, count(*) AS photos, min(e."fNumber") AS ord FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e."fNumber">0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ord

SELECT CASE WHEN e.iso<=100 THEN 'ISO ≤100' WHEN e.iso<=200 THEN 'ISO 101-200' WHEN e.iso<=400 THEN 'ISO 201-400' WHEN e.iso<=800 THEN 'ISO 401-800' WHEN e.iso<=1600 THEN 'ISO 801-1600' WHEN e.iso<=3200 THEN 'ISO 1601-3200' ELSE 'ISO 3200+' END AS iso, count(*) AS photos, min(e.iso) AS ord FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e.iso>0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ord

SELECT lpad(extract(hour from a."localDateTime")::int::text,2,'0')||':00' AS hour, count(*) AS photos FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT to_char(a."localDateTime",'ID')||' '||to_char(a."localDateTime",'Dy') AS day, count(*) AS photos FROM asset a WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Photos with a location
panels.description: Share of photos that carry GPS coordinates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.latitude IS NOT NULL)/nullif(count(*),0),1) FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime")

SELECT e.country, count(*) AS photos FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e.country IS NOT NULL AND e.country<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT e.city AS "City", coalesce(e.country,'') AS "Country", count(*) AS "Photos" FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e.city IS NOT NULL AND e.city<>'' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 12

panels.title: Photo map
panels.description: Geotagged photos aggregated to ~1 km cells; marker size = photo count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(e.latitude::numeric,2)::float8 AS latitude, round(e.longitude::numeric,2)::float8 AS longitude, count(*) AS photos FROM asset_exif e JOIN asset a ON a.id=e."assetId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ('$user' = 'All' OR a."ownerId" = (SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE name = '$user')) AND $__timeFilter(a."localDateTime") AND e.latitude IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2
SELECT u.name AS person, count(a.id) AS photos FROM "user" u LEFT JOIN asset a ON a."ownerId"=u.id AND a."deletedAt" IS NULL WHERE u."deletedAt" IS NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Storage per person
panels.description: Real on-disk usage. No per-user quota is set — consider configuring quotaSizeInBytes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT name AS person, "quotaUsageInBytes" AS bytes FROM "user" WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT date_trunc('month',a."localDateTime") AS time, u.name AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM asset a JOIN "user" u ON u.id=a."ownerId" WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND a."localDateTime" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Per-person details
panels.description: Per-person totals (whole library, ignores the person filter).

targets.rawSql: SELECT u.name AS "Person", count(a.id) FILTER (WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL) AS "Assets", count(a.id) FILTER (WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND a.type='IMAGE') AS "Photos", count(a.id) FILTER (WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL AND a.type='VIDEO') AS "Videos", u."quotaUsageInBytes" AS "Storage", (SELECT count(*) FROM person p WHERE p."ownerId"=u.id) AS "People", (SELECT count(*) FROM person p WHERE p."ownerId"=u.id AND p.name<>'') AS "Named", (SELECT count(*) FROM album al WHERE al."ownerId"=u.id AND al."deletedAt" IS NULL) AS "Albums" FROM "user" u LEFT JOIN asset a ON a."ownerId"=u.id WHERE u."deletedAt" IS NULL GROUP BY u.name, u."quotaUsageInBytes", u.id ORDER BY "Assets" DESC

panels.title: Storage growth (cumulative)
panels.description: Cumulative size of original files by import month.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m AS time, sum(b) OVER (ORDER BY m) AS "Total on disk (originals)" FROM (SELECT date_trunc('month',a."createdAt") AS m, sum(e."fileSizeInByte") AS b FROM asset a JOIN asset_exif e ON e."assetId"=a.id WHERE a."deletedAt" IS NULL GROUP BY 1) t ORDER BY m

panels.title: Face-naming progress
panels.description: Of 1,816 detected faces, this many are named. Name a few in Immich to unlock people search and 'who appears most'.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE name<>'')/nullif(count(*),0),1) AS pct FROM person

panels.title: Trash (reclaimable)
panels.description: Soft-deleted assets still on disk until purged.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Duplicate sets
panels.description: Groups Immich flagged as possible duplicates — review to reclaim space.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT "duplicateId") FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "duplicateId" IS NOT NULL

panels.title: AI search coverage
panels.description: Assets with CLIP embeddings for smart search.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*(SELECT count(*) FROM smart_search)/nullif((SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL),0),1)

panels.title: Offline assets
panels.description: Files Immich expected but couldn't find. Should be 0.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "isOffline"

panels.title: In an album
panels.description: Share of assets that belong to at least one album.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*count(DISTINCT aa."assetId")/nullif((SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL),0),1) FROM album_asset aa

panels.title: Tagged
panels.description: Share of assets with at least one tag.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0*count(DISTINCT "assetId")/nullif((SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL),0),1) FROM tag_asset

panels.title: Favorites
panels.description: Assets marked as a favorite.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM asset WHERE "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "isFavorite"
